description_long: This fence consists of three vertical wooden posts, each with a rough, natural finish and irregular, hand-cut tops. A single horizontal rail, also made of wood and featuring a wavy, uneven edge, is attached to the front of the posts with visible metal fasteners. The wood is depicted with a stylized grain pattern, giving it a rustic, handmade appearance. The posts are uneven in height, and two of them have pointed tops, while the third is flat. The construction appears simple and functional, suitable for marking boundaries or restricting passage in parks or natural urban areas. There are no decorative elements or additional features beyond the basic structure.
description: A rustic wooden fence with three uneven posts and a single wavy horizontal rail, fastened with metal bolts. The wood has a stylized grain and a rough, handmade look.
description_view_0: Front view showing three vertical posts, a single horizontal rail with a wavy edge, and visible metal fasteners.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the fence and the alignment of the posts and rail.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the posts and rail, with the wood grain pattern visible but no fasteners.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thin profile and the irregular tops of the posts.
